title: The Ultimate Solopreneur Agent Harness for AI Builders (Claude Code Harness)
summary: Ron Demerit's Solopreneur Agent Harness is a Claude-based framework with 16 specialized sub-agents orchestrated by a product manager agent that routes tasks across Opus, Sonnet, and Haiku models. The harness includes session locking for client isolation and was used to build three applications: a Spanish-learning music player, a local macOS Whisper transcription tool, and Hermit Host, a self-hosted deployment platform.
